maine_assumed_name_for_suffix.description: Alternate name used in Maine when the home-jurisdiction name does not contain the required LLP/LLC/Corp suffix per 31 MRSA §803-A. Distinct from entity.maine_fictitious_name (used when the home name is unavailable in Maine). Same key already used by MLLC-12.

maine_business_purpose.description: Free-text description of the nature of business or purposes to be conducted/promoted in Maine (FIFTH paragraph on foreign-qualification forms).

maine_activities_start_date.description: Date the foreign entity commenced or expects to commence conducting activities in Maine. Same key as MLLC-12 (entity.maine_activities_start_date).

is_professional_llp.description: Boolean elect-in indicating the foreign LLP is qualified as a professional LLP under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. Parallel to MLLC-12's entity.is_professional_llc. NOTE: on this template the corresponding TENTH checkbox is not extracted as an AcroForm widget — see open_questions.

line{1,2}.description: Two-line free-form description of professional services provided when entity.is_professional_llp=true. Two-line variant of MLLC-12's single-widget entity.professional_services_description; this LLP form has two underlined blanks instead of one, so the canonical key is split into .line1/.line2 to preserve widget fidelity.

name.description: Name of an LLP contact partner (indexed list — supports 1 inline row plus overflow on attached exhibit). Distinct from general_partner_N (LP-specific role) and manager_N (LLC-specific role); LLP terminology is 'contact partner'.

address.description: Combined business/residence/mailing address of an LLP contact partner (single-line on this form).

additional_attached.description: Boolean opt-in indicating an exhibit listing additional contact partners beyond the inline row is attached.

entity_name.description: Name of the entity signing on behalf of the filer (parallel to <role>_entity_N.name in the per-officer-signer pattern, applied to the single-filer filing.signer.* family). Used when the LLP is signed for by another entity.

entity_signer_printed_name_and_capacity.description: Printed name and capacity of the natural person who signs for the entity in filing.signer.entity_name. Parallel to <role>_entity_N.signer_printed_name_and_capacity (per-officer-signer convention).

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
